ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the indent size to the same size as in the editor's settings. Can be found under: Options > Editor > Tab indent size/Indent visual width.
ast.target: 将缩进大小设置为与编辑器设置中的大小相同。可在以下位置找到：选项 > 编辑器 > 制表符缩进大小/缩进视觉宽度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sort checklists whenever checkboxes are checked or unchecked.
ast.target: 每当复选框被选中或取消选中时，自动排序检查清单。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, checked tasks will be placed at the bottom. When disabled, they will be at the top.
ast.target: 启用后，已选中的任务将放置在底部。禁用时，它们将位于顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, checking a checkbox moves it along with all indented content (sub-tasks, paragraphs) as a block. When disabled, checkbox lines moves individually.
ast.target: 启用后，选中一个复选框会将其与所有缩进内容（子任务、段落）作为一个块一起移动。禁用时，复选框行将单独移动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify which checkbox characters mark tasks for deletion. Tasks with these characters are always sorted below tasks with other characters, and can be removed by using the delete command.
ast.target: 指定哪些复选框字符标记任务为待删除。带有这些字符的任务总是排在其他字符的任务之后，并且可以使用删除命令移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pasting keeps the sequencing consistent with the original numbered list.
ast.target: 粘贴时保持与原始编号列表一致的顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether lists always start from 1 or preserve their original starting numbers.
ast.target: 列表是始终从 1 开始，还是保留其原始起始编号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically sort numbered lists as changes are made.
ast.target: 随着更改自动排序编号列表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter single characters separated by spaces (case-insensitive). Default: 'X'.
ast.target: 输入由空格分隔的单个字符（不区分大小写）。默认值：'X'。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Example: '- /' means tasks with [x], [-], or [/] will be removed, while tasks with other characters like [>] will remain.
ast.target: 示例：'- /' 表示带有 [x]、[-] 或 [/] 的任务将被移除，而带有其他字符（如 [>]）的任务将保留。
